title: Jr AI Engineer
company_focus:
Cognitive data solutions and AI-based data extraction
platform
description:
We are seeking a AI Engineer to join our team and play a
critical role in the design and develop a cognitive data
solution. The broader vision is to develop an AI-based
platform that will crawl through unstructured data sources
and extract meaningful information. The ideal candidate will
possess full-stack development skills along with a strong
understanding of database structures, SQL queries, ETL tools
and Azure data technologies. Core Responsibilities Build and
deploy AI agents using various frameworks and tools. Lead
the design, development, and implementation of AI algorithms
and models to enhance payment and CX product offerings. Test
agent interactions, document behaviors, and help improve
reliability and performance. Assist with agent integration,
system testing, and deployment. Develop and deploy AI models
(including deep learning models) using TensorFlow, PyTorch,
and other ML/DL frameworks. Design and maintain the full AI
data pipeline, including data crawling, ETL, and building
fact tables. Apply statistical and programming expertise
(NumPy, Pandas, etc.) for data analysis and modeling.
Optimize AI models for on-premise infrastructure with a
focus on performance and security compliance. Stay abreast
of the latest trends in AI and contribute to continuous
improvements. Mentor junior AI/ML engineers and contribute
to documentation and process standardization. Contribute to
the broader AI agent ecosystem and cross-functional
collaboration. Required Experience Strong Python programming
skills and experience with full-stack development.
Experience with large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT,
Claude, etc. 3-4 years of experience in an AI engineer role.
Solid understanding of AI/ML concepts including NLP, ML
algorithms, deep learning, image/speech recognition.
Experience with Azure Data Factory, Databricks/Spark,
Synapse/SQL DW, and Data Lake Storage. Familiarity with data
pipelines, APIs, data exchange mechanisms, and RDBMS/NoSQL
databases. Ability to write clear and thorough
documentation. Enthusiasm for emerging AI technologies and
open-source collaboration. Nice to Have Experience with
agent frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT, CrewAI, Gen AI,
Agentic, Multi Agent etc.) Basic DevOps knowledge and
experience in scalable deployments. Experience with API
development and RESTful services. Familiarity with vector
databases (e.g., FAISS, ChromaDB, Pinecone, Weaviate). Prior
contributions to open-source AI projects or communities.
responsibilities: Build and deploy AI agents using various frameworks and tools
Lead the design, development, and implementation of AI algorithms and models to enhance payment and CX product offerings
Test agent interactions, document behaviors, and improve reliability and performance
Develop and deploy AI models including deep learning models using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and other ML/DL frameworks
Design and maintain the full AI data pipeline including data crawling, ETL, and building fact tables
Apply statistical and programming expertise for data analysis and modeling
Optimize AI models for on-premise infrastructure with focus on performance and security compliance
Mentor junior AI/ML engineers and contribute to documentation and process standardization
use_cases: Cognitive data solution for unstructured data extraction
Data crawling and information extraction from unstructured sources
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying AI agents
using frameworks like LangChain, developing AI/ML models
using TensorFlow and PyTorch, and implementing AI algorithms
for payment and CX products. The position requires hands-on
work with LLMs, deep learning models, and agent frameworks,
which is core AI/ML development work.
